exercise_name.description: The name of the exercise for strength goals (legacy, used when goal_type='strength')

target_weight.description: The target weight for strength goals (optional)

goal_type.description: Type of goal: strength-based or cardio-based

target_distance_meters.description: Target distance in meters for cardio_distance goals

target_duration_seconds.description: Target duration in seconds for cardio_duration goals

target_sessions.description: Target number of sessions for cardio_sessions goals

period.description: Goal period: week, month, or lifetime

period_start_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD - the date this period started counting from (nullable)

status.description: The current status of the goal
